pattern.imageEvidence: DJ running a soundcheck with compact speakers, mixer, and tidy cable setup
pattern.styleContract: Energetic and controlled with setup proof, real soundcheck evidence, signal-lime action accents, and a side-rail sound console as the signature move.

tagline: Sound setups for parties that still need conversation.

hero.title: SoundNest small-event DJ sound hero image
hero.alt: A professional DJ doing a soundcheck at a tidy mixer and speaker setup in a small event room.

contact.serviceArea: Small weddings, birthdays, nonprofit events, community rooms, patios, private dinners, corporate mixers, microphones, compact DJ setups, and sound support across town

copy.eyebrow: Small-event DJ and sound without the stage drama
copy.heroTitle: The right sound setup for the room you actually booked.
copy.heroText: SoundNest handles music flow, microphones, compact speakers, clean cables, and readable volume so small events feel alive without swallowing the room.
copy.introTitle: Great sound starts before the playlist.
copy.introText: We ask about room size, guest count, speeches, power, load-in, music tone, and whether dancing is the point or just part of the night.
copy.servicesTitle: Match the sound to the event
copy.quoteTitle: Ready to check your event date?
copy.quoteText: Send your date, venue, room size, guest count, and music needs. We will reply with the right sound package and setup notes.

services.title: Mixer Social
services.text: Background music, tasteful transitions, compact speakers, and a volume plan that still lets guests talk.

services.title: Dance-Ready Party
services.text: DJ flow, stronger speaker coverage, dance lights used with restraint, and a clean setup for birthdays or receptions.

services.title: Mic And Music Support
services.text: Ceremony audio, speeches, announcements, playlists, and compact sound for rooms that need clarity more than spectacle.

process.title: Share the room
process.text: Venue, power, guest count, speeches, and music tone help us choose the right setup.

process.title: Confirm load-in
process.text: We plan arrival, cables, speaker placement, and any venue limits before event day.

process.title: Soundcheck and host
process.text: We test levels, cue microphones, manage transitions, and keep the setup tidy through breakdown.

proof.label: speech support tested before guests arrive
